PriceRuleApplyAtEnum.description: When the price rule is applied.
PriceRuleApplyAtEnum.title: PriceRuleApplyAtEnum

PriceRuleStatusEnum.description:
Seller-facing status values for promotions.

The backend may define additional statuses (scheduled, expired,
cancelled) for internal lifecycle management, but sellers only
interact with these three.
PriceRuleStatusEnum.title: PriceRuleStatusEnum

description:
Promotion model for file-based definitions (promotion_v1 schema).

Extends PromotionData with:
- schema_version: Schema identifier for file validation
- extra="forbid" to catch typos in promotion files

This model is used for validating promotion TOML/JSON files
created by the CLI tool.

Note: pricing stays as dict[str, Any] because promotion pricing
(e.g., {"type": "multiply", "factor": "0.80"}) uses a simplified
format without a base field — the base is implicit (existing price).

name.description: Display name of the promotion (unique per seller)
name.title: Name

priority.description: Higher priority rules are applied first
priority.title: Priority

scope.description: Customer and service targeting. null = all customers, all services (blanket promotion).
scope.title: Scope

title: PromotionV1
